"100% - W - Sub-second counter; decremented every frame

"100% - B - Byte alias of difficulty_copy low byte; used in enemy spawn filtering"
"100% - W - Player-selected difficulty (0=Easy … 3=Hardest); copied to difficulty_copy on level load"
"100% - B - Palette validation status (4 bytes); determines which enemy palette slot is in use"
"100% - B - ID of the palette currently used by the active enemy"
"100% - B - Number of enemies currently using the active palette"
"100% - B - Current art-write state pointer; controls Write_Art sequencing"

"100% - W - P2 bonus-life score threshold pointer"

"100% - L - RAM address of P2 demo AI joypad input stream"

"95% - B - Player 2 object RAM slot (state/type byte at base)"
